session.title: Bulk Correct Moodle Competency Ratings via SQL (Student-Only Scope)
session.topic_summary: Defined and refined SQL to correct Moodle 4.5 competency ratings from 'Not yet competent' to 'Competent' for specified courses, ensuring alignment with Moodle’s competency and role/context schema. Added strict scoping to course contexts, preserved other ratings, and incorporated student-only and enrollment-safety constraints with verification and rollback guidance.

axes.label: Data Accuracy
axes.description: Correctly targets only eligible ratings and preserves others.

axes.label: Safety/Controls
axes.description: Includes verification, rollback, and cache considerations.

axes.label: Scalability
axes.description: Join strategy scales across multiple courses and users.

axes.label: Reusability
axes.description: Pattern usable for other competency scale corrections.

axes.label: Clarity
axes.description: Clear constraints and explicit context-level filtering.

axes.label: Speed
axes.description: Bulk update approach vs manual rating workflows.

blooms_progression.label: Remember
blooms_progression.title: Recall Moodle Schema
blooms_progression.description: Referenced Moodle context levels and core tables involved in competencies and roles.

blooms_progression.label: Understand
blooms_progression.title: Interpret Competency Storage
blooms_progression.description: Explained why ratings must map via scale value IDs instead of literal strings.

blooms_progression.label: Apply
blooms_progression.title: Compose Targeted SELECT
blooms_progression.description: Built a verification query scoping to affected courses and ‘Not yet competent’ labels.

blooms_progression.label: Analyze
blooms_progression.title: Disambiguate Context & Roles
blooms_progression.description: Joined role assignments to course contexts to isolate students only.

blooms_progression.label: Evaluate
blooms_progression.title: Assess Risks & Safeguards
blooms_progression.description: Added safeguards for scale integrity, non-impact of other ratings, and post-checks.

blooms_progression.label: Create
blooms_progression.title: Deliver Final Update Script
blooms_progression.description: Produced a production-ready UPDATE with student-only and optional active-enrollment constraints.

timeline.title: Problem Definition
timeline.description: User outlined the need to bulk-correct competency ratings across three Moodle courses while protecting other rating states.

timeline.title: Initial Solution & Safeguards
timeline.description: Provided verification SELECT and safe UPDATE mapping labels→scale value IDs within course contexts.

timeline.title: Student-Only Constraint
timeline.description: Refined the query by joining role assignments and roles to restrict updates to users with Student role in those course contexts.

timeline.title: Operational Guidance
timeline.description: Added post-update checks, optional active enrollment constraints, and rollback strategy.

employer_value.title: Operational Efficiency Uplift
employer_value.description: Demonstrates the ability to automate high-risk data corrections safely, reducing manual grading overhead and error probability.

employer_value.title: Governance & Compliance
employer_value.description: Applies rigorous scoping and rollback procedures, aligning with auditability and change-control expectations for learning systems.

employer_value.title: Learning Data Integrity
employer_value.description: Safeguards competency records, improving accuracy of progress dashboards and downstream analytics for decision-making.

meta.notes: Session analysis infers competence from problem framing and refinement; precise organizational role naming or custom scales may vary by site. ROI/time values are conservative estimates based on typical admin and consulting efforts for Moodle data corrections.
